description: worker/nodes/loader.py: LoadModel generic node
context: Create worker/nodes/loader.py: LoadModel @register node. INPUT_SLOTS=[SlotSpec("model_id","STRING")], OUTPUT_SLOTS=[SlotSpec("model","MODEL")]. Mock: return {"model":MockModel(arch="zit")}. Real: safetensors.safe_open, detect arch from metadata or filename, load via pipeline_cache.get_or_load(). Every pub method has docstring; every branch has inline comment. tests/test_nodes_loader.py TestLoadModel >=4 tests. ANVILML_WORKER_MOCK=1 pytest exits 0.

description: worker/pipeline_cache.py: LRU model cache
context: Create worker/pipeline_cache.py: PipelineCache(max_entries:int=2). get_or_load(model_id:str,dtype:str,loader_fn:Callable)->Any: return cached or call loader_fn()+cache; evict LRU when full; log eviction at INFO. OOM handler: on torch.cuda.OutOfMemoryError evict all then retry once. No dependency on arch/ modules. ANVILML_WORKER_MOCK=1 worker/.venv/bin/python -m pytest worker/tests/test_pipeline_cache.py exits 0 >=4 tests (hit/miss/eviction/OOM-skip-in-mock).

description: worker/nodes/arch/zit.py: ZiT FP8 architecture dispatch module
context: Create worker/nodes/arch/__init__.py: arch_registry + dispatch helpers. Create worker/nodes/arch/zit.py: can_handle(model_obj)->bool (arch=="zit"). sample(model,conditioning,latent,steps,cfg,seed,device,cancel_flag,emit_progress)->(latent,int); per-step cancel_flag.is_set() + emit_progress. Mock: (MockLatent(),seed). Real: model=transformer already cached by LoadModel via pipeline_cache.get_or_load(model_id). On first sample() call per model_id, assemble diffusers.ZImagePipeline(transformer=model, vae=..., text_encoder=...) from cached components; cache the assembled pipeline via pipeline_cache.get_or_load(f'{model_id}:pipeline',...), separate key from the transformer entry. Never from_pretrained(model_id) inside sample() -- re-loads full weights every call. Inline comment: transformer stays float8 (no upcast) when InferenceCaps.fp8=True; text_encoder/vae stay bf16. ANVILML_WORKER_MOCK=1 worker/.venv/bin/python -m pytest worker/tests/test_arch_zit.py exits 0 >=3 tests.

description: worker/nodes/arch/__init__.py: add get_module() dispatcher returning matching arch module
context: arch/__init__.py currently exposes only can_handle(model_obj)->bool (yes/no aggregate). Add def get_module(model_obj)->ModuleType|None: iterate same pkgutil.iter_modules(__path__) loop as can_handle(), return the first imported module whose can_handle(model_obj) is True, or None if no match. Do not remove can_handle() -- keep both; can_handle delegates to 'get_module(model_obj) is not None' internally to avoid duplicated iteration logic. Add get_module to __all__. ANVILML_WORKER_MOCK=1 worker/.venv/bin/python -m pytest worker/tests/test_arch_init.py -v exits 0 with >=3 new tests (returns zit module for arch=zit, returns None for unknown arch, can_handle still works post-refactor).

description: worker/nodes/arch/zit.py: add VAE_SCALE_FACTOR module constant
context: Add module-level VAE_SCALE_FACTOR: int = 8 to zit.py with a comment citing the source: Z-Image-Turbo's VAE config has block_out_channels=[128,256,512,512] (4 entries), giving 2**(4-1)=8 per ZImagePipeline.__init__'s vae_scale_factor formula; independently corroborated as 8x spatial compression (1024x1024 image -> 128x128 latent grid). Add to __all__. Consumed later by EmptyLatent's real path via arch.get_module(model).VAE_SCALE_FACTOR -- do not wire that consumer in this task, only add the constant. ANVILML_WORKER_MOCK=1 worker/.venv/bin/python -m pytest worker/tests/test_arch_zit.py -v exits 0, add 1 test asserting VAE_SCALE_FACTOR==8.

description: worker/nodes/arch/zit.py: add compute_latent_shape() function
context: Add def compute_latent_shape(batch_size:int,height:int,width:int,num_channels_latents:int)->tuple[int,...] to zit.py. Per ZImagePipeline.prepare_latents: h=2*(height//(VAE_SCALE_FACTOR*2)), w=2*(width//(VAE_SCALE_FACTOR*2)), return (batch_size,num_channels_latents,h,w). This replaces a bare VAE_SCALE_FACTOR lookup as EmptyLatent's (P18-D8) actual dispatch target, because other architectures (e.g. Flux 2 Klein, Phase 19) use a structurally different shape formula (2x2 latent packing, not a plain scale factor), so the shape FORMULA itself -- not just one constant -- must be architecture-specific and live inside the arch module. Add to __all__. ANVILML_WORKER_MOCK=1 worker/.venv/bin/python -m pytest worker/tests/test_arch_zit.py -v exits 0, add >=2 tests (correct shape for known height/width, divisibility edge case).

description: worker/nodes/loader.py: LoadModel real safetensors loading path
context: Replace LoadModel's NotImplementedError real path. model_id is now a real filesystem path (post P903-A1; no hash decoding needed). Use safetensors.safe_open(model_id,framework='pt') to read tensor metadata; detect arch via metadata.get('arch') if present, else infer from models/ dir layout naming convention (confirm exact convention via project_knowledge_search at ACT time, do not assume). Returned model object must expose .arch (str) and .in_channels (int, from transformer config) for EmptyLatent/arch.sample() to read. Inline comment per decision point. description: worker/nodes/sampler.py: EmptyLatent gains optional model input and real noise tensor path
context: Add SlotSpec('model','MODEL',optional=True) to EmptyLatent.INPUT_SLOTS (4th slot, after batch_size); update ANVILML_DESIGN.md section 10.3's EmptyLatent row (small edit, not a rewrite). description: worker/nodes/arch/zit.py: callback_on_step_end adapter for progress and cancellation
context: Add a private helper in zit.py: _make_callback(emit_progress,cancel_flag,total_steps) -> Callable matching diffusers' real callback_on_step_end signature (self,i,t,callback_kwargs)->dict, NOT the 2-arg emit_progress(step,total) shape sample()'s own signature describes (intentional mismatch -- this adapter bridges the two). The closure calls emit_progress(i,total_steps), checks cancel_flag.is_set() (confirm NodeContext.cancel_flag's exact type/API at ACT time), and raises a module-private sentinel _SamplingCancelled if cancelled. Returns callback_kwargs unchanged (or with 'latents' replaced if diffusers requires it -- confirm against source at ACT time) on the non-cancelled path. Add >=2 tests: emit_progress called correctly, cancellation raises _SamplingCancelled. ANVILML_WORKER_MOCK=1 worker/.venv/bin/python -m pytest worker/tests/test_arch_zit.py -v exits 0, same mock tests pass.

description: worker/nodes/arch/zit.py: invoke pipeline with output_type=latent and return result
context: Complete sample()'s real path: wrap the pipeline call (assembled in P18-D9a) in try/except _SamplingCancelled (defined in P18-D9b) for clean cancellation handling. Call pipeline(prompt_embeds=conditioning.positive,negative_prompt_embeds=conditioning.negative,latents=latent,num_inference_steps=steps,guidance_scale=cfg,output_type='latent',callback_on_step_end=_make_callback(emit_progress,cancel_flag,steps),return_dict=False). output_type='latent' is required so the result is the raw denoised latent tensor, not a decoded image -- VaeDecode (P18-D11) performs the actual decode as its own separate node per the design doc's explicit-VAE-input contract; do not decode here. Return (result[0],seed) on success; on cancellation, re-raise or return per whatever convention run_graph/executor.py expects for cancelled jobs (confirm at ACT time). ANVILML_WORKER_MOCK=1 worker/.venv/bin/python -m pytest worker/tests/test_arch_zit.py -v exits 0, same mock tests pass.
